title: YAG Laser Capsulotomy Complication
author: Riddhi Thaker
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: A 41-year-old presented with unilateral painful eye, with reduced vision since a YAG laser procedure. This was carried out by a local ophthalmologist when she presented with hazy vision in the right eye and gave a previous history of lens implantation.
